title: Punjab and Haryana High Court grants relief to doctors suspended over poor sex ratio
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court has stayed the Haryana government's recent decision to suspend four doctors on the ground of poor monitoring and implementation of measures relating to the improvement of sex ratio.Justice Sandeep Moudgil issued notice to the State and asked it to respond to the petitions. The Court ordered the State to permit the doctors to join their original places of posting in the meantime.The matter will be heard next on October 27."Till the next date of hearing, further p
